name: The Board (Control)
description:
For some reason no one has created this character yet, so I'll be the first. Apparently The Board isn't very popular... It's a pity. I like these kinds of beings.

Anyway, the plot for your story is simple. You're the new director and you want to find out about Faden's sudden and mysterious disappearance. It's up to you to decide what kind of relationship you had with her. However, you don't even have to look for her, just concentrate on your duties as director. You certainly have the freedom to choose where you want your rp to go.

As always, the bot settings are open, so you can look there for details.

Counter: 4
creator: Weisai
